lesson: Dense, heavy product with overrun reading 3% in the service menu means the air injector is scaled shut. Descale it — the scraper blades are fine.
symptoms: Product very dense and heavy — no light texture.
Soft serve comes out heavy and wet-looking instead of holding a swirl.
Portion volume is noticeably lower than usual.
Product tastes right but has the texture of dense ice cream.
Draw speed is slow on both small and large portions.

tests.error-log: No active faults. Overrun percentage in service menu reads 3% — should be 30–50%.
tests.inspect-beater: White mineral scale crusted through the mix path — anywhere hard water sits, it's furred up.

flavour: Restored the overrun. The manager called it 'fluffiness'. Close enough.
authenticityNote: The air injector port introduces overrun (entrained air) that gives soft serve its characteristic light texture. Scale blocks it completely and the product comes out like hard-pack ice cream. Only visible by checking overrun % in the service menu.
